name: file_management
description: Tools for creating, reading, and editing text files in the user's sandbox directory.

tools.name: create_file
tools.description: Create a new text file with specified content.

filename.description: Name of the file (e.g., 'notes.txt'). Must check if file exists first unless overwriting.

content.description: The initial content to write to the file.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the content of an existing file.

filename.description: Name of the file to read.

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Append content to the end of an existing file.

filename.description: Name of the file to edit.

content.description: Text to append to the file.
